runtimeBaseline.purpose: Primary visual and DOM baseline for review UI changes. Use before hand-written static drafts.

headline.purpose: Document h1 only, calm reading hierarchy.

title.purpose: File name, top bar, comments title, compact headings.

body.purpose: Long-form Markdown reading text, 65 to 75 character measure.

label.purpose: Tabs, compact buttons, pills, file tree metadata.

shadows.name: shadow-soft
shadows.purpose: Small floating UI in light mode, such as selection popovers.

shadows.name: shadow-floating
shadows.purpose: Larger floating panels in light mode, such as processed comment history.

shadows.name: dark-shadow-soft
shadows.purpose: Small floating UI in dark mode.

shadows.name: dark-shadow-floating
shadows.purpose: Larger floating panels in dark mode.

motion.name: state-fast
motion.purpose: Small hover, copied, and button feedback.

motion.name: panel-standard
motion.purpose: Sidebar collapse and compact layout changes.

rules: Start review UI changes from runtime baseline HTML, screenshots, fragments, and DOM measurements.
Blue is scarce: use it only for selected, active, linked, or review-ready state.
Resting panels are flat: use tonal layers and 1px dividers before shadows.
Codex handoff is comments workflow state, not a separate action center.
Automation state must show target file, comment count, completion, failure, and retry path.
Do not widen the 300px comments panel or add a tall handoff block above the first comment.

components.name: Compact Button
components.description: Default app action button. Small, familiar, and neutral unless it represents active review state.
components.css: .ds-compact-button { min-height: 26px; padding: 0 9px; color: #4d4f54; background: transparent; border: 1px solid #d8d8d5; border-radius: 7px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; } .ds-compact-button:hover { color: #222326; background: #eeeeec; }

components.name: Segmented Control
components.description: Used for view modes and comment filters.
components.css: .ds-segment { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 2px; padding: 2px; background: #eeeeec; border: 1px solid #e5e5e2; border-radius: 9px; } .ds-segment button { height: 27px; color: #73757b; background: transparent; border: 0; border-radius: 7px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; } .ds-segment .active { color: #4d4f54; background: #ffffff; }

components.name: Status Pill
components.description: Small textual state indicator for review and automation status.
components.css: .ds-status-pill { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; min-height: 20px; padding: 0 7px; color: #2f6fd6; background: #e8f0ff; border-radius: 999px; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1; }

components.name: Document Panel
components.description: Primary reading surface. It is bordered and tonal, not shadowed.
components.css: .ds-document { width: min(820px, 100%); margin: 0 auto; padding: 34px 42px 48px; color: #4d4f54; background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #e5e5e2; border-radius: 12px; font-size: 14.5px; line-height: 1.78; } .ds-document h1 { margin: 0 0 22px; color: #222326; font-size: 26px; font-weight: 520; line-height: 1.2; }

components.name: Codex Handoff Row
components.description: Compact comments-panel state row for ready, queued, running, completed, and failed Codex handoff. Must be validated against runtime baseline cases.
components.html:
Ready for Codex
3 open comments in guide.v1.md.
ready
components.css: .ds-handoff { padding-top: 10px; border-top: 1px solid #e5e5e2; background: transparent; } .ds-handoff .title { color: #222326; font-size: 12.5px; font-weight: 620; line-height: 1.25; } .ds-handoff .copy { margin-top: 2px; color: #73757b; font-size: 11.5px; line-height: 1.35; }
